name: Handle404Exception
description: Handles a 404 Not Found error by redirecting to the portal's defined 404 page or by returning a standard 404 response.
signature: public static void Handle404Exception(HttpResponse response, PortalSettings portalSetting)

parameters.name: portalSetting
parameters.description: The settings of the current portal.

name: AppendFileModifiedDate
description: Appends a version number based on the file's last modified date to a relative path. Useful for cache-busting CSS and JS files.
signature: public static string AppendFileModifiedDate(string relPath, string paramname = "v", bool useCache = true)

parameters.name: relPath
parameters.description: The relative path to the file.

parameters.name: paramname
parameters.description: The name of the query string parameter to add (default is 'v').

parameters.name: useCache
parameters.description: Whether to use caching for the generated URL.

name: ReturnString
description: Creates a dictionary for a standard API response, containing an HTML output string and an optional JSON object.
signature: public static Dictionary<string, object> ReturnString(string strOut, object jsonOut = null)

parameters.name: strOut
parameters.description: The HTML string for the 'outputhtml' key.

parameters.name: jsonOut
parameters.description: The JSON object for the 'outputjson' key.

name: HtmlOf
description: Decodes an HTML-encoded string.
signature: public static string HtmlOf(String htmlString)

name: HtmlDecode
description: Decodes an HTML-encoded string.
signature: public static string HtmlDecode(String htmlString)

name: HtmlEncode
description: Encodes a plain text string into an HTML-safe string.
signature: public static string HtmlEncode(String planStr)

parameters.name: planStr
parameters.description: The plain text string to encode.

name: RequestParam

signature: public static string RequestParam(HttpContextBase context, string paramName)

parameters.name: paramName
parameters.description: The name of the parameter to retrieve.

name: RequestQueryStringParam
description: Gets a request parameter from the query string.
signature: public static string RequestQueryStringParam(HttpRequestBase Request, string paramName)

parameters.name: paramName
parameters.description: The name of the parameter to retrieve.

name: ZipFolder

parameters.name: zipFileMapPath
parameters.description: The physical path where the zip file will be created.

parameters.name: zipFileMapPath
parameters.description: The physical path to the zip file.

parameters.name: outFolderMapPath
parameters.description: The physical path to the output folder.

parameters.name: dnnlistname

name: DeleteTempStorage
description: Deletes an item from temporary storage by its key.
signature: public static void DeleteTempStorage(string key)

parameters.name: key
parameters.description: The key of the item to delete.

name: ClearOldTempStorage
description: Deletes all expired items from the temporary storage table.
signature: public static void ClearOldTempStorage()

name: ImportWebsite
description: Initiates a DNN website import process from a given package file.
signature: public static ExportImportJob ImportWebsite(int portalId, string importDataMapPath)

parameters.name: portalId
parameters.description: The ID of the portal to import into.

parameters.name: importDataMapPath
parameters.description: The physical path to the import package (.zip file).
